realm.name: USER
realm.description: Standard application user — can manage own accounts and transactions

realm.name: ADMIN
realm.description: Application administrator — read-only oversight of all accounts

clients.name: Finance Tracker Admin Client
clients.description: Confidential client used by KeycloakAdapter for Admin REST API calls (client_credentials grant)

clients.name: Finance Tracker App
clients.description: Client used by the Spring Boot app for ROPC authentication flow

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token
